---
title: "The 10-year anniversary of intense protest in Greece and the role of Facebook"
author: "Papa, V., and Ioannou, M."
date: 2023-01-01
description: "Journal of Information Technology & Politics"
doi: "10.1080/19331681.2023.2168818"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1080/19331681.2023.2168818](https://doi.org/10.1080/19331681.2023.2168818)
